summary: A Fox News interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheehan. She speaks about officers who rescued detainees during the Dallas facility sniper shooting, with facility surveillance video shown beside her. The segment is a broadcast news interview with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'TROVE OF INFO RELEASED ON DALLAS I.C.E. SHOOTING'; 'FEDERAL FACILITY SURVEILLANCE VIDEO'; 'Madison Sheehan | Deputy I.C.E. Director'
